description: This file defines the 'Note' class, a domain model representing a note within the application. It includes properties such as id, title, content, tags, pinned status, and an optional updated timestamp. The class provides methods for copying with modifications, serialization from JSON, and serialization to JSON.

classes.name: Note
classes.description: Domain model representing a note within the app.

methods.name: copyWith
methods.description: Creates a copy of the Note with optional modifications.

methods.name: fromJson
methods.description: Creates an instance of Note from a JSON map.

methods.name: toJson
methods.description: Converts the Note instance into a JSON map.
